_comment: Single source of white-label brand config, shared by the web backend (read via app/services/branding_config.py) and the Flutter mobile app (flutter build --dart-define-from-file=../brand.json). Override per deployment; any key may also be overridden by an environment variable of the same name. Native app identity (Android applicationId, iOS bundle id, launcher icon, launcher label) is NOT set here: each organization is its own deployment and provisions its own domain and native app identity as part of that setup.
BRAND_TAGLINE: Sign in to manage your service
